filter_report.quality_score_formula: Per frame: frame_quality_score = 0.5 * avg_landmark_visibility + 0.5 * motion_local. avg_landmark_visibility = mean(visibility) over all keypoints in the frame. motion_local = stability of consecutive hip-center displacements within the same source video (1.0 at clip edges; lower when step-to-step motion is irregular). Sequence-level quality_score in features.json uses the same visibility mean plus motion_consistency from the full hip displacement series (see features_compute).

documentation.sequence_quality_score: Sequence quality_score = 0.5 * avg_landmark_visibility + 0.5 * motion_consistency, where motion_consistency derives from hip-center displacement mean vs std across the exported sequence.
documentation.per_frame_scores: Per frame: frame_quality_score = 0.5 * avg_landmark_visibility + 0.5 * motion_local. avg_landmark_visibility = mean(visibility) over all keypoints in the frame. motion_local = stability of consecutive hip-center displacements within the same source video (1.0 at clip edges; lower when step-to-step motion is irregular). Sequence-level quality_score in features.json uses the same visibility mean plus motion_consistency from the full hip displacement series (see features_compute).
